headline: A Look At American Water Works (AWK) Valuation After New US$2.4b Infrastructure Investment Report
summary: A new industry report estimating US$2.1b to US$2.4b in required U.S. drinking water infrastructure investment over 25 years has put long term rate pressure and capital needs in sharper focus for American Water Works Company (AWK) shareholders. See our latest analysis for American Water Works Company. At a share price of US$136.86, American Water Works Company has delivered a 4.5% 90 day share price return. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of a 4.1% decline indicates that longer...
